steps.title: Use the no solution condition
steps.content:
The equation has the form
$$(b-5)x=12$$
There is no solution when the coefficient of $x$ is $0$, because then the equation becomes $0=12$.

steps.title: Set the coefficient to zero
steps.content:
Solve for the value that makes the coefficient $0$.
$$b-5=0$$
$$b=5$$
The answer is A.
